# Birth Doula Support & Childbirth Education in East Texas

​Welcome to The Crunchy-ish Doula, where evidence-based education, compassionate birth support, and deep respect for the physiological design of birth come together.

Led by certified birth doula and childbirth educator Mallory Villafuerte, The Crunchy-ish Doula serves families across Tyler and the greater East Texas region, supporting them in making informed, confident decisions throughout pregnancy, birth, and postpartum.

[Schedule a Free Consultation](https://www.crunchydoula.com/book-a-call)

![11.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_9698fd128ef4488c9a297462cf85f5a6~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_544,h_409,al_c,lg_1,q_80,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_9698fd128ef4488c9a297462cf85f5a6~mv2.jpg)

## Empowering East Texas Families Through Education & Support

Birth is not something to be managed — it’s something to be understood, supported, and approached with confidence.

At The Crunchy-ish Doula, the focus is on restoring parents’ trust in their bodies while equipping them with clear, unbiased education so they can navigate any birth setting with clarity and peace.

Families are supported in hospital births, home births, and birth center deliveries, with care that adapts to real-world circumstances — not rigid ideals.

## Birth Doula Services in Tyler & East Texas

As your birth doula, Mallory provides continuous emotional, physical, and informational support before, during, and after birth.

Her role is not to replace medical care, but to bridge the gap between clinical systems and personal values, helping families feel heard, supported, and empowered throughout the birth process.

[View Birth Doula Services](https://www.crunchydoula.com/birth-doula-east-texas)

### What Birth Doula Support Includes

• Prenatal education and birth planning support

• Labor comfort measures and positioning

• Advocacy and communication support during labor

• Continuous presence during active labor and birth

• Emotional support for both birthing parent and partner

• Postpartum check-ins and resource guidance

​

Every family’s care is personalized because no two births are the same.

### Topics Covered in Childbirth Education

• The physiology of labor and birth

• Comfort measures and pain-coping strategies

• Medical interventions, risks, and benefits

• Induction education and decision-making

• Advocacy skills and informed consent

• Partner involvement and support roles

• Preparing for postpartum and newborn transitions

Education restores agency. Informed parents don’t control birth — but they do participate with confidence.

## Childbirth Education That Builds Confidence — Not Fear

The Empowered Birth Class is designed for parents who want more than surface-level information.

This class goes beyond coping techniques and dives into how birth works, how decisions are made, and how to stay grounded when plans change.

Whether you’re planning an unmedicated birth, a medicated hospital birth, a VBAC, or simply want to feel prepared — this education gives you tools that last well beyond delivery day.

[View Childbirth Education Classes](https://www.crunchydoula.com/childbirth-education-east-texas)

## A Balanced, Faith-Centered Approach to Birth

The Crunchy-ish Doula was founded on the belief that God designed the birthing body with intention and wisdom, while also recognizing that modern medical care can be lifesaving when needed.

Families are supported in holding both truths at once trusting the natural process of birth while remaining open handed to change, intervention, and flexibility when circumstances require it.

This is not fear based care.

This is informed, grounded, and peace centered support.

[Learn More About My Philosophy & Experience](https://www.crunchydoula.com/about-the-crunchy-ish-doula)

## Why Families Choose The Crunchy-ish Doula

• Deep knowledge paired with real-life experience

• Support without pressure or judgment

• Clear, honest education — not agendas

• Experience across hospital, home, and birth center settings

• A calm, steady presence during intense moments

• Strong advocacy rooted in respect and collaboration

Mallory is also a mother of three, bringing lived experience, empathy, and practical insight into every client relationship.

[Read Client Experiences](https://www.crunchydoula.com/about-the-crunchy-ish-doula)

## Serving Tyler, Longview & the Greater East Texas Area

The Crunchy-ish Doula proudly serves families throughout Tyler, Longview, and surrounding East Texas communities.

Whether you’re birthing locally or traveling to a nearby hospital or birth center, support is available wherever your journey leads.

![750_8729.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_874b0fb725d54e5ead4514033ce0b11c~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_69,h_46,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_874b0fb725d54e5ead4514033ce0b11c~mv2.jpg)

## Start Your Birth Journey Feeling Prepared & Supported

Birth deserves more than guesswork.

If you’re looking for birth doula support or childbirth education in East Texas, The Crunchy-ish Doula is here to walk alongside you with clarity, compassion, and confidence.

[Schedule a Free Consultation](https://www.crunchydoula.com/book-a-call)

## Birth & Family Photography

Our doulas who specialize in birth and family photography bring a gentle, documentary-style approach to capturing your most meaningful moments. From the strength of labor to the first moments of bonding and the everyday magic of family life - they preserve your story with authenticity, emotion, and intention.

​

With a focus on connection over posing, these sessions allow you to stay fully present while we quietly document the love, details, and milestones you’ll want to remember forever. Whether it’s the raw beauty of birth or the warmth of a family gathering at home, our doulas create timeless images that honor your journey into and through parenthood.

![Pregnant mother receiving supportive birth preparation with an East Texas birth doula](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_839d1f6a60724d6fa2b8e714106d9657~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_420,h_276,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_839d1f6a60724d6fa2b8e714106d9657~mv2.jpg)

## What does a doula do during labor?

A doula provides non-medical physical, emotional, and informational support before, during, and after birth. From breathing techniques and position changes to advocacy and encouragement, your doula helps you and your partner feel calm, confident, and informed throughout labor - whether at home, in a birth center, or in the hospital.

## When should I hire a doula?

It’s best to connect with a doula by your second trimester so you have time to build trust, plan your birth preferences, and secure your support team. Postpartum and overnight care can also be booked during pregnancy or anytime after baby arrives, depending on availability.

![Newborn breastfeeding with compassionate postpartum doula support in East Texas](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_ed552dfe659142759622e31009efe31f~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_426,h_276,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Nursing%20Newborn.jpg)

![Twin newborns supported by experienced postpartum doula care in East Texas](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_0044cd0db8814389882d4dffe2cc4c14~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_490,h_408,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Twin%20Babies%20.jpg)

## Do postpartum doulas help overnight?

Yes. Overnight doula support helps parents get the rest they desperately need. Your doula cares for baby through the night-diapering, soothing, feeding support, tracking sleep and feeds-while you sleep. If you’re breastfeeding, we gently bring baby to you and handle everything afterward so you can fall right back asleep.

Golden Hour refers to the first uninterrupted hour after birth when baby is placed skin-to-skin with a parent whenever medically appropriate.  During this time, incredible things are happening  Babies begin adjusting to life outside the womb. Parents and babies start bonding through touch, smell, and sound. Baby's temperature, heart rate, and breathing can be supported through skin-to-skin contact. Many babies naturally begin showing feeding cues and may even self-latch.  One of the most beautiful things about Golden Hour is that it allows families time to simply be together after birth before moving on to routine procedures and visitors.  Of course, every birth is unique. Sometimes medical needs require immediate care, and that's okay too. If your Golden Hour didn't go exactly as planned, it doesn't mean you've missed your opportunity to bond with your baby. Connection can happen at any time. ![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_b17c9500e8e9479e956636e03049dc04f000.jpg/v1/fill/w_27,h_1440,al_c,q_80,usm_0.33_1.00_0.00,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_b17c9500e8e9479e956636e03049dc04f000.jpg)

# Birth Doula

As you embark on this transformative journey of pregnancy and prepare for the arrival of your new baby, it's natural to have many questions and emotions. In this season of change, a doula can be an invaluable guide. Based in Tyler, The Crunchy-ish Doula is here to offer more than just physical and emotional support during the birth process. I am a compassionate resource, helping you navigate the overwhelming information with evidence-based knowledge and providing a listening ear whenever you need it. With the support of me, you have a dedicated ally to help you embrace and cherish every moment of this beautiful experience.

![Pregnant 4.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/e60d7a_35684f5febcb4bf3959baf6aa6dd8fa8~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1102,h_382,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/e60d7a_35684f5febcb4bf3959baf6aa6dd8fa8~mv2.jpg)

## Birth Support

At Crunchy-ish Doula, I, Mallory, am dedicated to offering a holistic approach to your childbirth experience. As a trained professional, I provide continuous physical, emotional, and informational support before, during, and shortly after childbirth.

My role is to be your steadfast advocate, helping you articulate and achieve your birth desires, maintain your birth plan, and adapt gracefully if unexpected changes arise. I offer personalized support throughout labor and delivery, using comfort measures and pain relief techniques such as breathing exercises, relaxation methods, massage, and optimal labor positions.

I also work closely with your partner, providing reassurance and practical guidance on how they can best support and comfort you. At Crunchy-ish Doula, I am committed to making your birth experience as empowering and fulfilling as possible.

## Packages

### The Whole Shabang

$3500

Designed for families who want full-spectrum doula support throughout pregnancy, birth, and postpartum. This all-inclusive package combines personalized birth support, childbirth education, postpartum care, Fresh 48 photography, placenta encapsulation, and breastmilk jewelry to create a deeply supported and memorable birth experience for East Texas families.

- Prenatal support for questions & support

- 3 childbirth education guidebooks

- On-call support from 38–42 weeks

- Continuous labor & birth support

- 1st prenatal visit in office

- Childbirth Education Class with East Texas Doula Collective

- 2nd prenatal in office

- Postpartum visit with The Crunchy-ish Doula in home

- 8hrs overnight or daytime postpartum support with Certified Postpartum Doula of your choice apart of ETX Doula Collective

- Fresh 48 with a Photographer of your choice apart of ETX Doula Collective

- 925 sterling silver Breastmilk Jewelry  from The Crunchy-ish Doula

- Placenta Encapsulation from The Mindful Doula

- Birth preferences planning

- Comfort measures practice (positions, touch, breathwork, partner support)

- Support with early feeding + newborn basics

- Access to resource list and educational powerpoints (providers, classes, local referrals)

- TENS Unit Rental for labor included


### Elite

$2500

Created for parents who want comprehensive pregnancy, labor, and postpartum doula support with added recovery care after birth. This package is ideal for families looking for hands-on childbirth education, continuous labor support, overnight postpartum assistance, and guidance through early newborn care and feeding.

- Prenatal support for questions & support

- 3 childbirth education guidebooks

- On-call support from 38–42 weeks

- Continuous labor & birth support

- 1st prenatal visit in office

-  Childbirth Education Class with East Texas Doula Collective

- 2nd prenatal in office

- Postpartum visit with The Crunchy-ish Doula. 1-2hrs

- 8hrs overnight or daytime postpartum support with Certified Postpartum Doula

- Birth preferences planning

- Comfort measures practice (positions, touch, breathwork, partner support)

- Support with early feeding + newborn basics

- Access to resource list and educational powerpoints (providers, classes, local referrals)

- TENS Unit Rental for labor included


### Enhanced

$2000

A balanced birth doula package for families seeking personalized prenatal preparation, continuous labor support, and postpartum guidance without the extras of a fully inclusive experience. Perfect for parents who want confidence, education, and compassionate support throughout pregnancy and birth in East Texas.

- Prenatal support for questions & support

- 3 childbirth education guidebooks

- On-call support from 38–42 weeks

- Continuous labor & birth support

- 1st prenatal visit in office

- 2nd prenatal visit during Childbirth Education Class with East Texas Doula Collective

- 1 postpartum visit with The Crunchy-ish Doula

- Birth preferences planning

- Comfort measures practice (positions, touch, breathwork, partner support)

- Support with early feeding + newborn basics

- Access to resource list (providers, classes, local referrals)

- TENS Unit Rental for labor included


### Essential

$1600

Designed exclusively for repeat clients who already feel comfortable with pregnancy, postpartum recovery, and newborn care but still value trusted labor and birth support. This streamlined package provides continued connection, on-call doula care, and personalized birth support for growing families returning to The Crunchy-ish Doula.

- Repeat Clients Only

- Prenatal support for questions & support

- 3 childbirth education guidebooks

- On-call support from 38–42 weeks

- Continuous labor & birth support

- 1 prenatal visit

- Birth preferences planning

- Access to resource list (providers, classes, local referrals)

- TENS Unit Rental for labor included

- Not available for first time moms
